sources.name: SELECT e.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID, e.PAT_ID, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.PAT_ID ORDER BY e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME DESC) AS rn FROM PAT_ENC_HSP AS e WHERE NOT e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME IS NULL

raw_sql:
SELECT * FROM (
            SELECT e.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID, e.PAT_ID, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.PAT_ID ORDER BY e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME DESC) AS rn
            FROM PAT_ENC_HSP e WHERE e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME IS NOT NULL
        ) ranked WHERE rn = 1
